title: A New Beginning
content: You stand at the threshold of Eldoria. The air is thick with the scent of ancient pine and distant magic. The path ahead is yours to forge.

choices.text: Walk boldly through the main gates.
Slip through a gap in the crumbling walls.

title: A Clandestine Offer
content: A hooded figure approaches you in the flickering torchlight of The Shades. 'I have something that might interest someone of your... unique tastes,' he whispers.
